projects.name: Web Ruang PPID
projects.description: Public information service platform to support government transparency.
highlights: Built a public information service platform using modern technology
Implemented backend features for content management and public information

projects.name: School Management System
projects.organization: Yayasan Pendidikan Islam Terpadu Imam Syafii Sampit
projects.description: Centralized school management platform that streamlines student placement, halaqah learning, and academic administration — eliminating manual record-keeping and giving parents real-time visibility into their children's progress through automated reports and notifications.
highlights: Automated student halaqah placement and learning activity management
Real-time academic progress reports with parent notification system
Centralized dashboard for academic administration and monitoring

projects.name: Web Imam Syafii Sampit
projects.organization: Yayasan Pendidikan Islam Terpadu Imam Syafii Sampit
projects.description: Company profile website for Yayasan Pendidikan Islam Terpadu Imam Syafii Sampit.
highlights: Built a company profile website for Yayasan Pendidikan Islam Terpadu Imam Syafii Sampit

projects.name: REST API & Government Web System
projects.description: REST API service to support government administrative applications.
highlights: Built REST API services to support government administrative applications
Developed backend services for inter-system data exchange in government

projects.name: Queue Management REST API
projects.organization: Mall Pelayanan Publik Kabupaten Kotawaringin Timur
projects.description: REST API service for public service queue management system.
highlights: Built REST API services for visitor queue management system
Developed backend services to handle public service request queues

projects.name: Public Information Web Portals (Rebuild)
projects.description: Rebuilt government service website using Laravel framework.
highlights: Rebuilt government service website using Laravel framework
Implemented administrative modules for licensing and service management

projects.name: Public Information Web Portals
projects.description: Public service web portal using Codeigniter framework.
highlights: Built public service web portal using Codeigniter framework
Implemented portal features that facilitate access to public information

projects.name: feryirawan.com
projects.description: Personal portfolio website built with Next.js 16 App Router, React 19, and Tailwind CSS v4. Features server components, i18n (EN/ID), dark mode, and shadcn/ui components.
highlights: Feature-based architecture with Server Components by default
Multi-language support (English & Indonesian) via next-intl
Dark mode toggle with localStorage persistence
Fetch data from GitHub Pages static JSON API

projects.name: GPX Tool
projects.description: A web-based utility for viewing GPX files, managing waypoints, and measuring land area. Supports interactive marker placement and UTM coordinate input â€” like MapSource, but on the web.
highlights: Interactive map for GPX tracks & waypoints visualization
Land area measurement with UTM coordinate calculation
Interactive marker placement for spatial data input

projects.name: Sliding Puzzle Game
projects.description: A simple yet engaging sliding puzzle game to train your logic thinking. Features multiple difficulty levels and smooth tile animations.
highlights: Multiple difficulty levels for various skill levels
Smooth tile animations for a pleasant user experience
Game logic fully client-side with state management

projects.name: Simple Resume
projects.description: A clean, responsive personal resume website built with Next.js, Tailwind CSS, and shadcn/ui components. Designed to be easily customizable and ready to deploy.
highlights: Responsive and minimalist design with Tailwind CSS
UI components built with shadcn/ui for consistency
Easily customizable for various professional profiles

projects.name: Envelope Finance
projects.description: Digital envelope budgeting platform that helps users take control of their finances — replacing scattered spreadsheets with a structured pocket-based system, automated debt tracking, and interactive financial reports for informed decision-making.
highlights: Envelope budgeting system with 6 pocket types (Personal, Business, Savings, Goals, Debts, Receivables)
Automated debt & receivable tracking with outstanding amount calculation
Interactive financial reports with Recharts (bar, line, pie chart)

projects.name: English Conversation Partner
projects.description: Built an AI-powered English conversation platform that simulates real-life conversations through text and voice, helping learners practice speaking English anytime without requiring a tutor or language partner.
highlights: Conversation input via text (chat) or voice
AI responses in both text and voice (text-to-speech)
Natural two-way interaction like talking with a native speaker

projects.name: Persil Desa
projects.description: Centralized land administration platform that digitizes village-level land records, ownership history, and spatial data — replacing manual paper-based systems with GIS-powered interactive maps, improving transparency and administrative efficiency for village governments.
highlights: GIS-based land parcel visualization on interactive maps (Leaflet + OpenStreetMap)
Ownership history tracking and land mutation recording
Centralized land data management with fast search and validation
